title: GEEPAS Personal Blender 2 Speed Smoothie Milkshake Maker with Pulse Function - Mini Travel Blender for Protein Shakes with 2 Easy to Clean BPA Free Tritan Sports Bottles 0.6L, 300W, Red
features: ✅ MINI BLENDER FOR PERSONAL USE: The Geepas Personal Blender is equipped with a robust 300W motor, ensuring powerful and efficient blending for your favourite recipes. Ideal for making sports drinks, protein shakes, healthy fruit and vegetable thick smoothies, milkshakes, protein drinks, and more. The included bottles are designed for personal use, allowing you to blend and take your favourite beverages wherever you go be it to the gym, office, or on a day out.

✅ 0.6 L CAPACITY, 2 BPA-FREE TRITAN BOTTLES: With a generous 0.6 L capacity, this blender is perfect for whipping up delicious smoothies, diet shakes, and more, catering to your daily nutritional needs. The package includes two high-quality BPA-free Tritan bottles, ensuring the safety of your beverages. These durable bottles are perfect for your active lifestyle. Helpful for gym and office people, just within a few seconds you can carry a fresh smoothie.

✅ DETACHABLE 6 BLADES, TWO SPEEDS WITH PULSE FUNCTION: The blender features detachable 6 blades that make the cleaning process a breeze, ensuring hygiene and convenience. Customize your blending experience with the two-speed settings and pulse function. Achieve the perfect consistency for your smoothies and shakes effortlessly.

✅ NON-SLIP FEET WITH SAFETY SYSTEM: The blender is equipped with non-slip feet, providing stability while making your smoothies and protein shakes. Say goodbye to unnecessary movements and spills. The Geepas Personal Blender comes with a safety system to ensure secure operation, giving you peace of mind while blending.
✅ VERSATILE USAGE, 2-YEAR MANUFACTURER WARRANTY: Great for smoothies, diet shakes, and more, this personal blender is a versatile kitchen companion that caters to your health and wellness goals.
description: Product Description TWO SPEEDS WITH PULSE FUNCTION Customize your blending experience with 2 speed settings & pulse function.
